---
title: "Eriksen Flanker Experiment"
author: "Rubee Kung, Nicole Hua, Jacob Grima, Eda Kubra Ozkaya"
date: today
format: revealjs
---

## Introduction

- First bullet point
- Second bullet point

## Methods

- First bullet point
- Second bullet point

## Results
- First bullet point
- Second bullet point


## Discussion
- First bullet point
- Second bullet point


## Conclusion
- First bullet point
- Second bullet point
